query:
SELECT id, cobertizo_id, localizacion, COUNT(*) as count 
FROM paradas 
WHERE id IN (261, 121)
GROUP BY id, cobertizo_id, localizacion
ORDER BY id;

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4MNpKPTYaa3AiSj.root --database NB4DzLv3DwSWij5HcQ7rQi --execute SELECT id, cobertizo_id, localizacion, COUNT(*) as count
